title: Student can complete an assessment from instructions through submission
description: Verifies a student can start a test from instructions, answer questions with the timer running, submit, and see the submission confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open assessments instructions
Start the test
Select answers for the visible questions
Submit the test
Verify the assessment submission confirmation is displayed

title: Student can log in and reach dashboard
description: Verifies a student can sign in with valid credentials and lands on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Admin can create a new test via the full wizard and publish it to the tests list
description: Verifies an admin can complete all steps of the create-test wizard and the created test appears in the tests list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the create-test wizard
Fill the basic test information with valid values
Continue to the questions step
Add at least one question with valid answer options and mark a correct answer
Continue to the preview and confirm step
Confirm test creation
Click the navigation option to open the tests list
Verify the newly created test is listed in the tests list

title: Student can view personal results summary and attempts
description: Verifies a student can reach the student results page and see their performance summary with an attempts list displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view student results
Verify a personal performance summary is displayed
Verify an attempts list is displayed

title: Toggle system lock with confirmation
description: Verifies an admin can toggle the system lock after confirming and the new lock state is reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open management
Initiate the system lock toggle
Confirm the system lock change in the confirmation prompt
Verify the system lock state is updated in the management UI

title: Trigger master sync and observe completion UI
description: Verifies an admin can trigger a master sync, sees progress feedback, and then sees a success notification when it completes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open management
Trigger the master sync action
Wait for the progress indicator to complete
Verify a master sync success notification is visible

title: Admin can open attempt details from results overview
description: Verifies an admin can view the results overview and open a student attempt to see question-level detail.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view admin results
Open a student result from the overview list
Open an attempt from the student's attempts list
Verify question-level attempt details are displayed

title: View management analytics and audit stream
description: Verifies an admin can view global trend charts/metrics and recent audit entries on the management page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open management
Verify global trend charts and key metrics are displayed
Verify recent entries in the audit stream are displayed

title: Admin can update branding and see it reflected in the UI
description: Verifies an admin can change branding settings, save, and see the updated branding reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open system settings
Fill a new university name into the university name field
Select a different valid primary color value
Save the settings changes
Verify the updated university name is reflected somewhere in the UI

title: Admin security policy persists after refresh
description: Verifies an admin can update the max login attempts setting, save, refresh, and still see the updated value persisted.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open system settings
Fill 5 into the max login attempts field
Save the settings changes
Press F5
Verify the max login attempts field still shows 5

title: Upload users from CSV/Excel and review validation report
description: Verifies an admin can upload a valid CSV/Excel file and sees a validation report summarizing the upload outcome.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open bulk user upload
Upload a valid CSV or Excel file using the page upload control
Submit the upload
Verify an upload validation report is displayed summarizing successes and failures

title: Required-question validation prevents submission until all required questions are answered
description: Verifies attempting to submit with required questions unanswered shows a validation error and submission succeeds after completing remaining required items.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open assessments instructions
Start the test
Submit the test
Verify a required-questions validation error is visible
Select answers for all required unanswered questions
Submit the test
Verify the assessment submission confirmation is displayed

title: Add a new user and see it appear in the master table
description: Verifies an admin can add a new user from the user management section and the new user appears in the master user table.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open management
Open the user management section
Start adding a new user
Fill "Test User A" into the name field
Fill "test.user.a+{{RUN_ID}}@example.com" into the email field
Select a role for the new user
Save the new user
Verify a user row for "test.user.a+{{RUN_ID}}@example.com" appears in the master user table

title: View available tests list
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the tests page and see a list of available tests or an appropriate empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the tests page
Verify available tests are displayed or an empty state is shown

title: Edit an existing user's role and see the update in the table
description: Verifies an admin can change a user's role and the updated role is reflected in the master user table.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open management
Open the user management section
Start adding a new user
Fill "Role Change User" into the name field
Fill "role.change+{{RUN_ID}}@example.com" into the email field
Select an initial role for the new user
Save the new user
Edit the user row for "role.change+{{RUN_ID}}@example.com"
Select a different role for the user
Save the changes
Verify the user row for "role.change+{{RUN_ID}}@example.com" shows the updated role

title: Update and persist profile changes
description: Verifies a user can edit profile information, save it successfully, and see the updated information displayed afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the profile page
Fill a new full name into the name field
Save profile changes
Verify the profile page shows the updated name value

title: Upload a file and see it listed with status
description: Verifies a user can upload a file from My Uploads and the uploaded item appears in the list with a visible status.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the uploads page
Click the action to upload a new file
Select a small valid file from the file picker
Wait for the upload to finish processing
Verify the new upload appears in the uploads list with a visible status

title: Admin results view supports narrowing results with filters
description: Verifies an admin can change visible results using available filtering controls and the list updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view admin results
Select a different value in an available results filter control
Verify the results list updates to reflect the selected filter

title: Delete an uploaded file from My Uploads
description: Verifies a user can delete an existing upload and the file is removed from the uploads list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the uploads page
Click the action to upload a new file
Select a small valid file from the file picker
Wait for the upload to finish processing
Delete the newly uploaded file from the list
Verify the deleted file no longer appears in the uploads list

title: Browse resources and open a resource detail
description: Verifies an authenticated user can browse resources and open a resource detail view successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the resources page
Click a resource item from the list
Verify the selected resource detail content is displayed

title: Admin cannot save settings with invalid max login attempts
description: Verifies the settings form blocks saving when max login attempts is invalid and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open system settings
Fill 0 into the max login attempts field
Save the settings changes
Verify a validation error is visible for the max login attempts field

title: Admin cannot save settings with missing required branding fields
description: Verifies the settings form blocks saving when required branding inputs are empty and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open system settings
Clear the university name field
Save the settings changes
Verify a required-field validation error is visible for branding settings

title: Student results page handles empty state
description: Verifies that when a student has no attempts, the results page shows an empty state instead of an attempts list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view student results
Verify an empty state message is visible indicating no results are available

title: Forgot-password shows confirmation after submitting email
description: Verifies a user can request a password reset and sees a confirmation message after submitting an email.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill a valid email into the email field
Submit the forgot-password form
Verify a password recovery confirmation message is visible

title: Reject unsupported bulk upload file type
description: Verifies an admin cannot upload a non-CSV/unsupported file type and sees a file format validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open bulk user upload
Upload an unsupported file type using the page upload control
Submit the upload
Verify a file format validation error is visible

title: Open resources page and handle empty state
description: Verifies an authenticated user can reach the resources page and sees an empty state when no resources are available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the resources page
Verify resources are displayed or an empty state is shown

title: Admin results page handles empty state
description: Verifies that when there are no results to show, the admin results overview displays an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view admin results
Verify an empty state message is visible indicating no results are available
